failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only adverse directional archetype inversion with opposite-direction US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0004 work must change a meaningful state-archetype, feature, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0003 by only nudging adverse label weights, inversion score weights, top archetype count, min archetype count, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 9 losing folds, 0 profitable folds, negative total tick net PnL, target-range entry frequency, and strongly negative proxy PnL

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, while tick execution worsened total net PnL by 9.47 versus logic; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Adverse directional archetype inversion achieved target-range activity but lost all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, so inverted adverse states are not a candidate as tested.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local archetypes are more useful as adverse directional states that can be inverted into opposite-direction entry events
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: third C0004 true variant; changes model and trade-logic interpretation from selecting favorable archetypes to identifying train-only adverse directional archetypes and trading the opposite direction; not a label-weight, top-count, min-count, daily-entry, stop, target, hold, session, or retry nudge from R0001 or R0002

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must fit adverse archetype inversion rules only inside each rolling train window
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 validation is attempted
proxy must report inversion diagnostics without creating selected claims
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: closed-bar state archetype features for volatility, trend, compression, range position, body, session, and direction-specific adverse evidence; no feature set is selected

label.summary: directional forward outcome labels used to find reliably adverse archetypes for inversion; no label is selected

model.summary: train-fold-local adverse directional archetype model that scores reliable losing states as possible opposite-direction opportunity; no model family or objective is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule enters opposite the train-fold-local adverse archetype direction, then uses schedule replay for mandatory MT5 validation
